productOptionsHtml:

Catalog highlights

  • Premium Apron Fashion Colors
  • Size: 23"W x 30"H, waist ties are 36", pockets 7"W x 8"H & adjustable neck strap
  • Fabric: 7.5 oz. of 65/35 poly cotton twill w/ stain resistant treatment
  • Colors: Hot Pink, Lime Green, Mango Yellow, Turquoise Blue, Black pinstripe
  • Sold blank, decoration options are available upon request.

salesToolsHtml:
Pitch this SKU — Premium Apron Fashion Colors w/ 2 Patch Pockets. Lead with use case (uniforms, retail, teams, recognition), then minimums and timeline. Reference included services from “Price includes” in the Description tab when present (e.g. setup, virtual proof, shipping offers).

  • Quote style EF53 on proposals and POs.
  • Offer virtual proofs and artwork checks before production.
  • Cross-sell with hats, bags, or jackets for kit programs.
  • For decoration and imprint methods, follow supplier notes in the Description tab.

Approved partners can request internal sell sheets, comparison matrices, and margin guidance from the A Design Line team.
inventoryHtml:
Merchandise is typically sourced to order. Stock and availability may vary by supplier and season.

Supplier-stated production window: 2 days (not including transit).

Contact the studio for rush feasibility, split shipments, or multi-location drops before placing large orders.

Minimum order quantity: 25 units (per catalog line).
